text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 
45 
CLM_RLT_OCRNC_CD 
LABEL: 
Claim Related Occurrence Code 
DESCRIPTION: The code that identifies a significant event relating to an institutional claim or encounter record that 
may affect payer processing. 
These codes are associated with a specific date (the claim related occurrence date). 
SHORT NAME: CLM_RLT_OCRNC_CD 
LONG NAME: CLM_RLT_OCRNC_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE:
